title: LightEconomy
description: An easy-to-implement and lightweight economic API on Forge
body:
## LightEconomy
This mod provided a lightweight economy api (like Vault on Bukkit) for Forge, it adds player a "balance" NBT value to count server players' balance and coin.
This mod does not provide any commands or scripts that help modify the player's economy, please use my other mod EcoHelper to cooperate with it.
